query:
-- Crear VIEW para media de edad
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW edad_promedio AS
SELECT 
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(edad AS NUMERIC)), 1) as edad_media,
  COUNT(*) as total_respuestas,
  MIN(edad) as edad_minima,
  MAX(edad) as edad_maxima
FROM respuestas
WHERE edad IS NOT NULL;

-- Crear VIEW para media de ideología
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW ideologia_promedio AS
SELECT 
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(posicion_ideologica AS NUMERIC)), 1) as ideologia_media,
  COUNT(*) as total_respuestas,
  MIN(posicion_ideologica) as ideologia_minima,
  MAX(posicion_ideologica) as ideologia_maxima
FROM respuestas
WHERE posicion_ideologica IS NOT NULL;
